aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Rajin Cajun due to limited conversational content and missing structured data, but there is potential for improvement.

critical_issues: Missing photos, posts, and Q&A to engage users and improve local search visibility.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for service explanations

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content prevents AI models from identifying them as a reliable source.

ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQ content with FAQPage schema to provide AI models with structured, relevant information.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, licenses, and expertise through schema markup and content to position them as the local HVAC authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business visible to the chatbots and AI assistants shaping customer decisions.

agency_pitch.proof_point: Their GBP is not found, and their website lacks the structured data necessary for AI models to cite them.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, GBP optimization, and conversational content to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your services.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing market share—act now to avoid falling behind.
